content: Coconut cream is a very condensed coconut milk with a consistency similar to sour cream.
Light coconut milk is less concentrated and more watery, suitable for cooking rather than beverages.
Coconut butter is made by reducing coconut cream further, resulting in a spreadable product with more fat and fewer fibers.
Coconut water is an electrolyte-rich drink without coconut meat, primarily used for hydration.
Coconut milk in a carton is reconstituted coconut milk with additional water, making it a beverage with higher calorie content.
